prediction_method: CatBoost Outcome Model + Rating-Based Poisson Goal Model + Candidate Expected-Points Optimizer
explanation: Spain selected because its candidate scoreline maximized expected competition points. CatBoost outcome probabilities were Spain 69.8%, draw 22.5%, Saudi Arabia 7.8%. Poisson expected goals were Spain 2.16 and Saudi Arabia 0.67. Elo diff 531.0, FIFA points diff 421.0.
